final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing magazine-style cover design for a Xiaohongshu post announcing "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" platform launch.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, premium aesthetic
Composition: diagonal layout
Subject: GPT-image-2 × Lovart platform collaboration announcement
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: high-contrast accent colors
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" "Lovart"
Constraints: must read clearly as Xiaohongshu cover thumbnail
Avoid: generic flat social media aesthetic, low-contrast palettes
